emails.subject: Enron Corp. ISDA Master Agreements
emails.body: Enron Corp. ISDA Master Agreements All: Before Rod became a Brit, we were working with Enron Corp. treasury to put in place some masters in the name of ENA for the following parties: Bear, Stearns Internaitonal Limited Credit Agricole Indosuez CSFB International Lehman Brother Finance S.A. Morgan Stanley Capital Services Inc. Deutsche Bank These masters will be used to for equity deals on ENE stock. The Treasury group has concluded together with Rex Rogers and V&E, that Enron Corp. is the appropriate swap counterparty for these masters and NOT ENA. Who in credit will be available to assist me in this process? Thanks. Sara

emails.subject: Re: Enron Corp. ISDA Master Agreements
emails.body: Re: Enron Corp. ISDA Master Agreements Did you ever receive a response on this? If not, let's discuss. Bill From: Sara Shackleton on 08/23/2000 05:47 PM

emails.subject: Re: Enron Corp. ISDA Master Agreements
emails.body: Bill: Thanks. When will you have some time? Maybe tomorrow after our DeutscheBank call? SS William S Bradford 09/12/2000 07:18 AM

emails.subject: Enron Corp. ISDA Master Agreements
emails.body: Bill: I am resending my earlier message which identifies the correct legal entities with which Enron Corp. would like to execute ISDA Master Agreements (for the purpose of entering into equity trades). In addition to the entities listed below, we need to include "Merrill Lynch International" ("MLI"). ENA just negotiated an agreement with MLI, so the Enron Corp. master should be fairly simple. Also, Clint and Jeff are interested in transacting with Toronto Dominion Bank. In that regard I note that Enron has an Interest Rate and Currency Agreement with Toronto Dominion Bank, New York Branch. I'll review this agreement to see if it requires amendment. Jeff/Clint: Do want to deal with a specific Toronto Dominion branch? All: I will expect that Bill will provide credit worksheets and I'll either begin the ISDA process or change "ENA" to Enron Corp. on those agreements which have previously been sent. Thanks. Let me know if you have any questions. Sara Forwarded by Sara Shackleton/HOU/ECT on 09/18/2000 02:46 PM Sara Shackleton 08/23/2000 05:47 PM

emails.subject: Enron Corp. ISDA Master Agreements
emails.body: Bill: The Enron Corp. board passed a resolution last week authorizing equity transactions on ENE stock. Clint and Jeff are anxious to proceed with the negotiation of ISDA Master Agreements with the parties we have been discussing. Please send credit to me for preparation of documentation. As always, please let me know if you have any questions. Thanks. Sara Forwarded by Sara Shackleton/HOU/ECT on 10/16/2000 05:06 PM Sara Shackleton 09/18/2000 03:00 PM
